title: Add masking support to C API
body:
## This PR adds basic API's for the SkMask class as well as blitting SkBitmaps with those masks.

**Why?**
[Blitting](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bit_blit) is necessary to support legacy specifications that do not support alpha channels natively.
A workaround for this was to load the image and the mask into SkBitmaps and apply the mask using a blend mode. 

Unfortunately this workaround has a couple drawbacks:

1. It wraps the mask in functionality it was not meant to have.
2. It inflates the size of 1 bit per pixel stencil masks (SkBitmap does not support 1bpp color spaces).

**What's been done:**

- SkMask exposed.
- A function to blit a bitmap given a mask has been exposed.

**What's left to do:**
- Add full support for masks with 3D color spaces.
- Expose functionality for blitting with the SkShaderBlitter descendants.
- Expose SkAAClip ([background info on this](http://neugierig.org/software/chromium/notes/2010/07/clipping.html)).
